_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Prepare audit reports that identify technical and procedural findings, and provide recommended remediation strategies/solutions.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct periodic data compliance assessments, documenting findings, evidence, risk ratings, and remediation assignments.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.548), RC-K-014 (RC, cosine: 0.543).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.611). Shared vocabulary: [findings, remediation]. DCWF-only terms [audit, identify, prepare, procedural, provide, recommended] vs WIDAI-only terms [assessments, assignments, compliance, conduct, data, documenting] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.891 (P=0.888, R=0.893). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 13-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (61.2%). The model interprets "Prepare audit reports that identify technical and procedural findings, and provi" as logically implying aspects of "Conduct periodic data compliance assessments, documenting findings, evidence, ri" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Superset of' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.598 ≈ STS 0.611 (gap 0.013). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [findings, remediation] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [findings, remediation]. DCWF-only: [audit, identify, prepare, procedural, provide, recommended]. WIDAI-only: [assessments, assignments, compliance, conduct, data, documenting].
